name: Bon Bon Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together cream cheese and butter.
2. Add flour and chill the mixture.
3. Roll the dough on wax paper coated with confectioner's sugar. The dough will absorb about 1 cup of sugar, so roll it to a thickness of approximately 1/8 inch.
4. Cut each piece into 1 x 3-inch rectangles.
5. Place half a walnut in the center of each rectangle.
6. Roll up each rectangle tightly, pinch and seal the edges.
7. Arrange the rolled cookies on a baking sheet with the folded side down.
8. Bake for 15 to 17 minutes at 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
9. Sprinkle with confectioner's sugar once baked.
